name: code-review
description: High-signal code review for NestJS APIs and Next.js (App Router) + React 19 apps. Implements a modular router skill that delegates to framework-specific checklists, enforces a >85% confidence threshold, and runs a Chain-of-Verification pass before reporting findings — combining patterns from the everything-claude-code reviewer agents, awesome-copilot NestJS instructions, awesome-cursorrules Next.js 15 / React 19 rules, the Arbiter modular-prompt findings, and the official NestJS / Next.js / React docs.
